name: Pressure Seal Key
enabledDescription: A calibrated pressure key. It should fit the deep bore bulkhead.
disabledDescription: A pressure key, but the calibration dial is smashed.

name: Calibration Tool
enabledDescription: A recalibrated pressure key, ready to use.
disabledDescription: You need the calibration tool to fix the pressure key first.

name: Drill Override Card
enabledDescription: An override card for the drill chamber bulkhead. The deep bore is accessible.
disabledDescription: An override card, but it won't work without a pressurised seal behind it.

name: Garrison ID Badge
enabledDescription: A valid garrison ID. Doors with biometric readers might respond to this.
disabledDescription: A garrison ID badge, but the chip is fried.

name: Field Chip Reader
enabledDescription: A chip reader that has restored the badge's authentication data.
disabledDescription: A chip reader. It needs a badge to interface with.

name: Armoury Keycard
enabledDescription: An authenticated armoury keycard. The weapons cache should open now.
disabledDescription: An armoury keycard. The authentication handshake won't complete without the chip reader.

name: Printed Tide Schedule
enabledDescription: An old tide schedule. The safe windows are highlighted by someone who knew.
disabledDescription: A tide schedule, but the ink is badly water-damaged and unreadable.

name: UV Lamp
enabledDescription: A UV lamp that revealed the tide schedule's hidden annotations.
disabledDescription: A UV lamp. It might help you read something damaged.

name: Tidal Airlock Override
enabledDescription: You know the safe window. The flooded corridor can be entered without drowning.
disabledDescription: An airlock override switch. Using it blind would flood the corridor while you're inside.

name: Atmospheric Filter Mask
enabledDescription: A working filter mask. The methane content won't affect you now.
disabledDescription: A filter mask, but the canister is spent and needs replacing.

name: Replacement Filter Canister
enabledDescription: A fresh canister fitted into the mask. Ready to breathe.
disabledDescription: A filter canister. It needs a mask to be useful.

name: Grid Access Terminal Code
enabledDescription: The terminal code for the central power grid. You can reach it now without the atmosphere killing you.
disabledDescription: A terminal access code, but the power grid room vents raw methane. You need a working mask first.

name: Cipher Fragment
enabledDescription: Half of a decryption key, salvaged from a researcher's personal drive.
disabledDescription: A cipher fragment. Incomplete — it won't decrypt anything alone.

name: Second Cipher Fragment
enabledDescription: Both fragments combined form a full decryption key.
disabledDescription: Another cipher fragment. You need the first piece before this is useful.

name: Full Decryption Key
enabledDescription: A complete key assembled from both fragments. The server room's encrypted logs can now be read.
disabledDescription: An incomplete decryption key. You're still missing a fragment.

name: Colonist Survey Map
enabledDescription: A survey map with cache locations hand-marked. The western marker is circled.
disabledDescription: A rolled-up survey map, water-stained and stuck shut.

name: Cache Excavation Tool
enabledDescription: A lightweight dig tool. You know where to use it.
disabledDescription: An excavation tool. Without a map, you'd be digging blind.

name: Buried Supply Crate
enabledDescription: A crate of colonist provisions, exactly where the map said. The supply depot has more context on what's inside.
disabledDescription: You've found something buried, but you can't get it open without the excavation tool.

name: Thermal Protection Suit
enabledDescription: A sealed heat suit rated for volcanic environments. The deeper facility is survivable now.
disabledDescription: A heat suit with a cracked visor. Wearing it near the vents would be fatal.

name: Replacement Visor Seal
enabledDescription: A visor seal fitted to the heat suit. The suit is now fully rated.
disabledDescription: A visor seal. It needs a suit to be fitted to.

name: Vault Override Chip
enabledDescription: A hardened override chip for the deep vault. The black site's lowest level is open.
disabledDescription: An override chip for the vault. The thermal interference near the vents scrambles it — you need full suit protection to carry it in.

name: Signal Decoder
enabledDescription: A decoder tuned to the refinery's maintenance ping frequency.
disabledDescription: A signal decoder, but it needs calibrating to the right frequency first.

name: Frequency Log
enabledDescription: A frequency log recovered from the tether station. The decoder is now calibrated.
disabledDescription: A frequency log. It's meaningless without a decoder to feed it into.

name: Broadcast Room Access Code
enabledDescription: You've isolated the ping source. The broadcast room door responds to the decoded signal.
disabledDescription: An access code derived from the ping — but it only works once you've decoded the full signal.

name: Thermal Lance
enabledDescription: A working thermal lance, capable of cutting through ice-sealed doors.
disabledDescription: A thermal lance with a dead power cell.

name: Charged Power Cell
enabledDescription: A charged cell fitted to the thermal lance. It's ready to cut.
disabledDescription: A power cell. It needs a lance to be installed in.

name: Provisions Store — Melted Entry
enabledDescription: The ice-sealed provisions store door has been cut open. The abandoned supplies inside are accessible.
disabledDescription: The provisions store door is frozen solid. You need something that can cut through it.

name: Rig Operations Manual
enabledDescription: A manual detailing the autonomous cycle override procedure.
disabledDescription: A rig operations manual, but the relevant section is torn out.

name: Torn Manual Pages
enabledDescription: The missing pages reattached — the override procedure is now complete.
disabledDescription: Torn pages from a manual. They need the rest of the document to make sense.

name: Drill Arm Shutoff Code
enabledDescription: The autonomous drill arm cycle has been halted. The drill bay is no longer dangerous to enter.
disabledDescription: A shutoff code, but entering the drill bay to use it while the arms are cycling would be suicide. Read the manual first.
